---
name: story-planning
description: Decompose work into INVEST-style stories with observable acceptance criteria.
---

# Story Planning Skill

## Checklist
- Clarify persona, problem, outcome, and constraints.
- Split work into independently valuable stories where possible.
- Write acceptance criteria that are observable and testable.
- Call out dependencies, risks, and validation approach.

## Output
Return stories with title, user value, acceptance criteria, dependencies, and validation notes.
